chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1269 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.6478/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.6479/2025. 3. For orders on CMA No.6480/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 26.03.2025 Mr. Uzair Qadir Shoro, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Learned DAG waives notice of this petition. Petitioner’s counsel submits that the controversy as raised in this matter regarding inter- corporate dividend already stands decided by a judgment dated 28.02.2023 passed in CP D 8569 of 2018 (International Brands Limited vs. Federation of Pakistan & Others), whereby the petition has been dismissed. In view of this position, instant petition is also dismissed for the reasons so assigned in the aforesaid judgment. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
